items.title: Amazon’s last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
items.summary: If you like to read by the pool or at the beach, the 2021 Kindle Paperwhite remains one of the best e-readers available despite its age. That’s because, unlike Amazon’s latest e...

items.title: The $6 Billion Chinese Startup Trying to Build Hands for Every Robot
items.summary: LinkerBot makes dexterous robotic hands for as little as $600. It wants to become the standard for humanoids and automated factories—and eventually replace human labor altogether.
